notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed package contains mostly ordinary visible events (紫薇仙子 calculating, 影无邪 traveling, etc.) and ambiguous relations. The only candidate for a hidden fact would be 凤金煌's intention to possibly return the fox immortal grotto to 方源 (event: '凤金煌一直留着狐仙地灵，未成为福地真正主人，可能想将来还给方源'), but this is described as speculation ('可能') and is an internal motive that is not directly source-backed as a known fact from the text pointers. The source pointers do not contain a direct quote supporting this as a known fact. Other events are either public actions or speculative. No strong source-backed hidden/future-known fact can be extracted.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly entity descriptions, relations, and event summaries but lacks direct narrative text showing character actions from which motives can be confidently inferred. Events like '紫薇仙子推算三个月确认狐仙是逆组织成员' and '凤金煌一直留着狐仙地灵' are summarized without direct dialogue or action context. Observed behaviors are too abstract to support a cautious one-step motive inference without psychological leaps.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains multiple individuals (紫薇仙子, 凤金煌, 方源, 影无邪, etc.) but no named collective faction/group with a concrete stake in a pressure axis. 天庭 appears as a faction label but the seed facts only show individual-level interactions (紫薇仙子 advising 凤金煌, 天庭 members planning to capture 公孙良). 逆组织 is mentioned but only through individual membership (狐仙, 方源) without a clear collective stake or pressure in this chapter. 风云府 is mentioned only as a location (管辖地) with no stake. No family/clan/faction pressure axis (interest, threat, resource, reputation, geography, succession, inheritance) is directly source-backed for any collective actor in this seed.
IF export filter quarantined 9 legacy old-schema branches.
